description: Proof signals for consulting roles. Designed to fire narrowly on consulting-specific CV language rather than general business language, to prevent over-matching consulting roles to every analytical candidate.

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted client engagements or consulting projects
proof_signals.context: Direct consulting engagement experience indicates core delivery capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked at Big 4 firm (Deloitte, EY, KPMG, PwC) or strategy consulting firm
proof_signals.context: Big 4 or strategy firm background provides structured consulting methodology training

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed or delivered client-facing presentations and reports
proof_signals.context: Client deliverable creation is a core consulting output

proof_signals.signal_text: Scoped, proposed, or sold consulting engagements or advisory services
proof_signals.context: Business development in a consulting context requires engagement scoping and pricing skills

proof_signals.signal_text: Led or contributed to RFP/RFI responses
proof_signals.context: RFP response experience indicates proposal development capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Performed financial due diligence or M&A advisory
proof_signals.context: M&A due diligence is a specialized consulting skill with high market value

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted internal audit or SOX compliance projects
proof_signals.context: SOX and internal audit experience maps directly to risk consulting roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed risk assessments, risk matrices, or remediation plans
proof_signals.context: Risk assessment methodology is core to compliance and risk consulting

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or implemented compliance frameworks (NIST, ISO 27001, COSO)
proof_signals.context: Framework implementation experience signals deep compliance consulting capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Led or supported digital transformation initiatives for clients
proof_signals.context: Digital transformation delivery is a growing consulting domain

proof_signals.signal_text: Advised clients on technology strategy, platform selection, or system implementation
proof_signals.context: Technology advisory requires both technical understanding and consulting delivery skills

proof_signals.signal_text: Applied structured problem-solving frameworks (MECE, issue trees, hypothesis-driven analysis)
proof_signals.context: Explicit framework usage signals consulting methodology training

proof_signals.signal_text: Facilitated client workshops, discovery sessions, or stakeholder alignment meetings
proof_signals.context: Workshop facilitation is a key consulting delivery skill

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed engagement economics, utilization, or project P&L
proof_signals.context: Engagement economics management indicates senior consulting capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted competitive analysis, market assessments, or industry benchmarking
proof_signals.context: Market and competitive analysis is foundational to strategy consulting

proof_signals.signal_text: Presented findings or recommendations to C-suite or board-level stakeholders
proof_signals.context: Executive-level presentation experience indicates senior advisory capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed or improved business processes, operating models, or organizational structures
proof_signals.context: Process and operating model design is core to management consulting

proof_signals.signal_text: Managed multiple concurrent client projects or engagements
proof_signals.context: Multi-engagement management indicates consulting portfolio management capability

proof_signals.signal_text: Partnered with external auditors, regulators, or compliance bodies
proof_signals.context: External auditor coordination is specific to risk and audit consulting

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience in client acceptance, engagement acceptance, or continuation reviews
proof_signals.context: Engagement risk management is a Big 4-specific consulting skill

proof_signals.signal_text: CPA certification or CPA candidacy
proof_signals.context: CPA is a strong advantage for risk, audit, and financial consulting tracks

proof_signals.signal_text: Degree in economics, business administration, accounting, or industrial engineering
proof_signals.context: Standard educational backgrounds for consulting entry in Israel

proof_signals.signal_text: MBA or advanced business degree
proof_signals.context: MBA is valued for strategy and management consulting progression

proof_signals.signal_text: Conducted or supported change management and organizational transformation
proof_signals.context: Change management is a cross-cutting consulting skill

proof_signals.signal_text: Developed maturity assessments or gap analyses for clients
proof_signals.context: Maturity assessments are a structured consulting deliverable format

proof_signals.signal_text: Built financial models, cost-benefit analyses, or investment feasibility assessments
proof_signals.context: Financial modeling supports both M&A and strategy consulting tracks

proof_signals.signal_text: Acted as internal consultant or led internal strategic projects across departments
proof_signals.context: Internal consulting experience indicates transferable consulting skills even without firm experience

proof_signals.signal_text: Designed or delivered training programs, knowledge transfer, or enablement sessions for clients
proof_signals.context: Client enablement and training is part of the consulting delivery lifecycle

proof_signals.signal_text: Published thought leadership, industry research, or white papers
proof_signals.context: Thought leadership signals senior consulting expertise and practice development

proof_signals.signal_text: Led or contributed to practice development, new service offerings, or methodology creation
proof_signals.context: Practice development is a key differentiator at senior consulting levels

proof_signals.signal_text: Experience with ERP systems (SAP, NetSuite, Zuora) in advisory or implementation oversight capacity
proof_signals.context: ERP experience in a consulting context supports technology transformation roles

proof_signals.signal_text: Advised on AI adoption, AI strategy, or AI-powered solution design for clients
proof_signals.context: AI advisory is a rapidly growing consulting domain in Israel

proof_signals.signal_text: Identified red flags, anomalies, or compliance gaps during review or audit processes
proof_signals.context: Red flag identification is a specific skill in risk and compliance consulting

proof_signals.signal_text: Worked globally or cross-border on consulting engagements
proof_signals.context: Cross-border engagement experience is valued at Big 4 firms and global consulting practices

proof_signals.signal_text: Prepared business cases, investment memos, or strategic recommendation documents
proof_signals.context: Business case development is a core consulting deliverable across all tracks
